calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-05-2019 Continued To Jan-06-20 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-05-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bizon Group Inc., appellant/defendant is NOT present;
Traci Bone, respondent/plaintiff, is present;
Jonathan Lakritz, respondent/plaintiff is also present.

This case comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

There being no appearance by the appellant, the appeal is dismissed.

The Court accepts the decision as proof of damages, and affirms the decision. Judgment is ordered in favor of Traci Bone and Jonathan Lakritz, and against Bizon Group, Inc., in the amount of $2988.00, principal, $75.00 costs; total judgment $3063.00.

Judge Pro Tem: Elliott Myles; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 525.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Judgment Entered
